title: picea abies var. compacta
intro: Picea abies var. compacta, also known as Dwarf Norwegian Spruce, is a compact and slow-growing evergreen tree or shrub, belonging to the Pinaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Dwarf Norwegian Spruce have been reported to provide relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the needles and branches of Picea abies var. compacta can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are valued for their potential health benefits, including reducing stress and promoting overall well-being.
